name: The Oath
overview: Angelos Raptis, perhaps the best general surgeon in Greece, is a recognized scientist in a happy marriage to lawyer Iro Anagnostopoulou, with whom they have a brilliant daughter, Melina. The countdown begins on the night of his birthday, on duty, when he is brought dead, from a car accident, his wife and daughter, who were helpless on the road for many hours. Angelos loses everything in one night: his family and his faith. This leads him to deny reality but also life.

trailers.title: O Όρκος | Πρεμιέρα Σάββατο 5 Φεβρουαρίου και κάθε Σάββατο 22.00 | ΕΡΤ1
